name: ASUS PRIME B760M-F, Intel® B760 LGA 1700 micro-ATX motherboard,PCIe 4.0, two PCIe 4.0 M.2 slots, DDR5, Realtek 1Gb Ethernet, HDMI, SATA 6 Gbps, USB 5Gbps ports, Aura Sync
shortName: ASUS PRIME B760M-F, Intel® B760 LGA 1700 micro-ATX motherboard,PCIe
description: ASUS PRIME B760M-F is an entry-level mATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR5 and PCIe 4.0 M.2 slots.
